members.name: AddDoMethod
members.summary: Register a [Callable] that will be called when the action is committed.

members.name: AddDoProperty
members.signature: public void AddDoProperty(Object @object, StringName property, Variant value)
members.summary: Register a [param property] that would change its value to [param value] when the action is committed.

members.name: AddDoReference
members.summary: Register a reference to an object that will be erased if the "do" history is deleted. This is useful for objects added by the "do" action and removed by the "undo" action. When the "do" history is deleted, if the object is a [RefCounted], it will be unreferenced. Otherwise, it will be freed. Do not use for resources. [codeblock] var node = Node2D.new() undo_redo.create_action("Add node") undo_redo.add_do_method(add_child.bind(node)) undo_redo.add_do_reference(node) undo_redo.add_undo_method(remove_child.bind(node)) undo_redo.commit_action() [/codeblock]

members.name: AddUndoMethod
members.summary: Register a [Callable] that will be called when the action is undone.

members.name: AddUndoProperty
members.signature: public void AddUndoProperty(Object @object, StringName property, Variant value)
members.summary: Register a [param property] that would change its value to [param value] when the action is undone.

members.name: AddUndoReference
members.summary: Register a reference to an object that will be erased if the "undo" history is deleted. This is useful for objects added by the "undo" action and removed by the "do" action. When the "undo" history is deleted, if the object is a [RefCounted], it will be unreferenced. Otherwise, it will be freed. Do not use for resources. [codeblock] var node = $Node2D undo_redo.create_action("Remove node") undo_redo.add_do_method(remove_child.bind(node)) undo_redo.add_undo_method(add_child.bind(node)) undo_redo.add_undo_reference(node) undo_redo.commit_action() [/codeblock]

members.name: ClearHistory
members.summary: Clear the undo/redo history and associated references. Passing [code]false[/code] to [param increase_version] will prevent the version number from increasing when the history is cleared.

members.name: CommitAction
members.summary: Commit the action. If [param execute] is [code]true[/code] (which it is by default), all "do" methods/properties are called/set when this function is called.

members.name: CreateAction
members.signature: public void CreateAction(String name, int mergeMode, bool backwardUndoOps)
members.summary: Create a new action. After this is called, do all your calls to [method add_do_method], [method add_undo_method], [method add_do_property], and [method add_undo_property], then commit the action with [method commit_action]. The way actions are merged is dictated by [param merge_mode]. The way undo operation are ordered in actions is dictated by [param backward_undo_ops]. When [param backward_undo_ops] is [code]false[/code] undo option are ordered in the same order they were added. Which means the first operation to be added will be the first to be undone.

members.name: EndForceKeepInMergeEnds
members.summary: Stops marking operations as to be processed even if the action gets merged with another in the [constant MERGE_ENDS] mode. See [method start_force_keep_in_merge_ends].

members.name: GetActionName
members.summary: Gets the action name from its index.

members.name: GetCurrentAction
members.summary: Gets the index of the current action.

members.name: GetCurrentActionName
members.summary: Gets the name of the current action, equivalent to [code]get_action_name(get_current_action())[/code].

members.name: GetHistoryCount
members.summary: Returns how many elements are in the history.

members.name: GetVersion
members.summary: Gets the version. Every time a new action is committed, the [UndoRedo]'s version number is increased automatically. This is useful mostly to check if something changed from a saved version.

members.name: HasRedo
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if a "redo" action is available.

members.name: HasUndo
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if an "undo" action is available.

members.name: IsCommittingAction
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the [UndoRedo] is currently committing the action, i.e. running its "do" method or property change (see [method commit_action]).

members.name: Redo
members.summary: Redo the last action. Returns [code]false[/code] if there was no action to redo.

members.name: StartForceKeepInMergeEnds
members.summary: Marks the next "do" and "undo" operations to be processed even if the action gets merged with another in the [constant MERGE_ENDS] mode. Return to normal operation using [method end_force_keep_in_merge_ends].

members.name: Undo
members.summary: Undo the last action. Returns [code]false[/code] if there was no action to undo.

members.name: MaxSteps
members.summary: The maximum number of steps that can be stored in the undo/redo history. If the number of stored steps exceeds this limit, older steps are removed from history and can no longer be reached by calling [method undo]. A value of [code]0[/code] or lower means no limit.

signals.name: VersionChanged
signals.summary: Called when [method undo] or [method redo] was called.

values.name: MERGE_ALL
values.summary: Merges this action with the previous one if they have the same name.

values.name: MERGE_DISABLE
values.summary: Makes "do"/"undo" operations stay in separate actions.

values.name: MERGE_ENDS
values.summary: Merges this action with the previous one if they have the same name. Keeps only the first action's "undo" operations and the last action's "do" operations. Useful for sequential changes to a single value.

constants.name: MERGE_DISABLE
constants.summary: Makes "do"/"undo" operations stay in separate actions.

constants.name: MERGE_ENDS
constants.summary: Merges this action with the previous one if they have the same name. Keeps only the first action's "undo" operations and the last action's "do" operations. Useful for sequential changes to a single value.

constants.name: MERGE_ALL
constants.summary: Merges this action with the previous one if they have the same name.
